com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external

Interface ExtNSDKModuleManager


  • public interface ExtNSDKModuleManager
    (v2.3.0-alpha3) Main entrance of NSDK(Newland Software Development Kit) external modules. Provides the ability to get all the external device modules.

    Note: If using bluetooth to connect external PIN pad device, pair it in the system settings on the android device first.

    Follow below steps to operate external device:

         // 1. Get the instance of the module manager.
     ExtNSDKModuleManager moduleManager = ExtNSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance();

     // 2. Get a default communicator provided by NSDK.
     CommunicatorListener communicatorListener = new CommunicatorListener() {
         @Override
         public BluetoothDevice onBluetoothList(ArrayList arrayList) {
             // Choose expected bluetooth device to return.
         }

         @Override
         public void onConnectedStateChange(ExternalCommunicatorState externalCommunicatorState) {
             // Do something when state changes.
         }
     };
     try {
         communicator = moduleManager.getNSDKCommunicator(context, ExternalCommunicatorType.BLUETOOTH_CLASSIC, communicatorListener);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         e.printStackTrace();
     }

     // 2. Or new a customized communicator which implements 'ExternalCommunicator' and set it to NSDK.
     // CustomizedCommunicator communicator = new CustomizedCommunicator();
     // moduleManager.setCommunicator(communicator)

     // Set UART config if needed.
     // UART3Config config = new UART3Config(BaudRate.BPS115200, DataBits.DATA_BIT_8, ParityBit.NO_CHECK, StopBits.STOP_BIT_ONE);
     // moduleManager.setUART3Config(UART3Type.PINPAD_A7, config);

     // 3. Open external device.
     try {
         int timeout = 2000;
         communicator.open(timeout);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         e.printStackTrace();
     }

     // 4. Init external modules after the device is opened successfully.
     try{
         moduleManager.initExternalModules();
     } catch(NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }

     // 5. Get the specified device module.
     ExtBeeper beeper = (ExtBeeper) moduleManager.getModule("EXT_BEEPER");

     // 6. Invoke methods of the beeper module.
     try {
        beeper.beep(BeeperTone.SUCCESS, 1000);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }

     // 7. Close external device.
     try {
         communicator.close();
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         e.printStackTrace();
     }

     // 8. Destroy device modules.
     moduleManager.destroy();

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void destroy()
      Releases device resources.
      java.lang.String getErrMsg(int errCode)
      Get external error message bt its errorCode
      Module getModule(java.lang.String moduleName)
      Gets the device module according to the module name.
      NSDKCommunicator getNSDKCommunicator(Context context, ExternalCommunicatorType type, CommunicatorListener listener)
      Gets default communicator which is implemented by NSDK to establish communication channel and handle data exchange with external device.
      void initExternalModules()
      Initializes external device modules.
      boolean ping()
      Tests the communication channel.
      void setCommunicationTimeout(int sendTimeout, int receiveTimeout)
      Sets timeout for sending/receiving data.
      void setCommunicator(ExternalCommunicator communicator)
      Sets customized communicator to NSDK for data exchange with external device.
      void setCryptoMode(SymmetricKey key, AlgorithmParameters params)
      Set the pinpad default encrypt algorithm.
      void setDebugMode(LogLevel level)
      Sets debug level.
      void setUART3Config(UART3Type type, UART3Config config)
      Sets UART3Port config, should be called before opening external device.

    • Method Detail

      • initExternalModules

        void initExternalModules()
                  throws NSDKException
        Initializes external device modules.

        This shall be called after external device is opened and before getting any external device modules.

        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getModule

        Module getModule(java.lang.String moduleName)
        Gets the device module according to the module name.
        Parameters:
        moduleName - [Required] The name of the device module. See ModuleType.
        Returns:
        The required device module.

      • destroy

        void destroy()
        Releases device resources.

      • getNSDKCommunicator

        NSDKCommunicator getNSDKCommunicator(Context context,
                                     ExternalCommunicatorType type,
                                     CommunicatorListener listener)
                              throws NSDKException
        Gets default communicator which is implemented by NSDK to establish communication channel and handle data exchange with external device.
        Parameters:
        context - [Required] The context should not be null.
        type - [Required] Communication type of external device. See ExternalCommunicatorType.
        listener - [Required] Listens to device list and returns selected device when the communication type is ExternalCommunicatorType.BLUETOOTH_CLASSIC or ExternalCommunicatorType.BLUETOOTH_LOW_ENERGY.
        Returns:
        NSDK default communicator to establish and manage communication channel. SeeExternalCommunicator.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setUART3Config

        void setUART3Config(UART3Type type,
                    UART3Config config)
             throws NSDKException
        Sets UART3Port config, should be called before opening external device.

        Note: This works when current communicator type is ExternalCommunicatorType.UART3PORT.

        Parameters:
        type - [Required] UART port type, see UART3Type.
        config - [Required] UART config, see UART3Config.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setDebugMode

        void setDebugMode(LogLevel level)
        Sets debug level.
        Parameters:
        level - [Required] Debug level, see LogLevel. Default log level is LogLevel.OFF.

      • setCommunicator

        void setCommunicator(ExternalCommunicator communicator)
        Sets customized communicator to NSDK for data exchange with external device.
        Parameters:
        communicator - [Required] Customized communicator.

      • setCommunicationTimeout

        void setCommunicationTimeout(int sendTimeout,
                             int receiveTimeout)
                      throws NSDKException
        Sets timeout for sending/receiving data.

        Note: The timeout shall >= 0.

        Parameters:
        sendTimeout - [Required] Timeout for sending data. Default value is 10000ms. Unit: ms.
        receiveTimeout - [Required] Timeout for receiving data. Default value is 10000ms. Unit: ms.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • ping

        boolean ping()
        Tests the communication channel.
        Returns:
        Result. true: the channel is OK, false: the channel is unable to send/write data.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setCryptoMode

        void setCryptoMode(SymmetricKey key,
                   AlgorithmParameters params)
            throws NSDKException
        Set the pinpad default encrypt algorithm.
        Parameters:
        key - [Required] Key used to encrypt
        • Key type
        • Key usage
        params - [Required] Algorithm parameters, see AlgorithmParameters.
        • IV is required when cipher mode is CipherMode.CBC
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getErrMsg

        java.lang.String getErrMsg(int errCode)
        Get external error message bt its errorCode
        Parameters:
        errCode - [Require] ErrorCode system thrown
        Returns:
        External error Message according to errCode
